title: App Store & Google Play Data Scraper Output
description: Structured app metadata records plus a machine-readable run summary that distinguishes success, empty results, partial source failures, spending-limit stops, and total failure.

results.title: App store metadata records
results.description: Clean dataset items containing non-personal public app metadata, ratings summary, pricing, version, media, country, and store URL data.

runSummary.title: Run summary
runSummary.description: Outcome, counts, source warnings, locale, and spending-limit status for this run.
